markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To sync on key operational challenges and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**EM Onboarding Gap:** The current EM onboarding is too high-level. The team will formalize a tactical program, including shadowing and graduation criteria, using Marisol's existing work as a foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy Shift:** The team will stop offering backlinks due to vendor quality and client churn risks (e.g., AmiBit, Exec, Interwell). Kyle will investigate new vendors for clients with backlinks in their SoW.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**OS/Check That Pricing Block:** A lack of clarity on the OS/Check That product relationship is blocking pricing decisions. The team will ask leadership to define the user experience and bundling strategy to unblock planning.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [**Capacity Crisis:** The team is at 79/83 capacity slots, with a 9-slot loss from recent departures and reassignments. Matthew will present a formal plan to Bridget advocating for immediate backfills.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3510.0)

## Topics

### EM Onboarding

  - [**Problem:** The current onboarding is too high-level, forcing new EMs to rely on ad-hoc questions for tactical work.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Solution:** Formalize a structured, tactical program.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Foundation:** Use Marisol's existing work-in-progress as a starting point.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**New Elements:** Add shadowing/sidecar experiences, inspect-and-assign workflows, and clear graduation criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Review the WIP document with Marisol and George in a future session to identify gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Current backlink vendors are low-quality and risky, leading to client churn (e.g., AmiBit, Exec, Interwell).](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Decision:** Stop offering backlinks as a service.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [**Action:** Kyle will investigate new, higher-quality vendors for clients with backlinks in their Statement of Work (SoW). The goal is to offer a pass-through partnership or direct connection, not to manage the workflow internally.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### AmiBit Agency Collaboration

  - [**Problem:** AmiBit's new paid agency, New Seed, requested all GrowthX artifacts (Content OS, QBRs), raising concerns about competitive risk and trust.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
  - [**Solution:** Provide a curated "GrowthX brief" instead of raw files.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
      - [**Content:** A high-level summary of strategy, content clusters, and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2734.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Demonstrates collaboration without exposing proprietary data.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2704.0)
      - [**Method:** Use Claude Codework to generate the brief from existing documents.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2734.0)

### OS & Check That Pricing

  - [**Problem:** Conflicting guidance on the Check That/OS product relationship prevents final pricing decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
      - [**Unclear Relationship:** Is Check That a standalone product, a feature within OS, or both?](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
      - [**Bundling Strategy:** How will OS and Check That be packaged for different client types?](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
      - [**Trial Periods:** What are the rules for 90-day vs. 2-week free trials?](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [**Action:** Ella will present a table of potential product scenarios to Daniel and Marcel for clarification.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)

### Matthew's Claude Skill

  - [**Tool:** A Claude skill for EMs to generate reports from Notion and Slack data.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2920.0)
  - [**Risk:** The skill can leak private information (e.g., DMs) if not carefully reviewed, as its data access is scoped to the individual user's connected accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)
  - [**Guidance:**](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2999.0)
      - [Always review reports locally before sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3046.0)
      - [Create a dedicated, scoped "EM Clod" to manage data access and mitigate privacy risks.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3056.0)

### Capacity Planning

  - [**Problem:** The team is at 79/83 capacity slots, with a 9-slot loss from recent departures and reassignments, eliminating the previous buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3582.0)
  - [**Analysis:** Matthew's draft plan shows the team is at full capacity through March 21.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3569.0)
  - [**Action:** Matthew will finalize a formal document detailing the capacity crunch and present it to Bridget, advocating for immediate backfills.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3412.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
      - [Send the OS/Check That product scenario table to Daniel and Marcel for clarification.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
      - [Consolidate feedback on the OS launch checklist into Notion by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
      - [Work with Matthew to create the curated "GrowthX brief" for the New Seed agency.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [Investigate new backlink vendors for clients with backlinks in their SoW.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3412.0)
      - [Finalize and share the capacity planning document.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=3412.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
      - [Review and comment on the OS launch checklist document by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/q3TGVmzcTpypM-d8VyD95eA6za3Yw1uL?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
